# Plugin Installation Checklist

## ✅ Before You Start
- [ ] Obsidian is installed and running
- [ ] Vault is open: `d:\EWM Robot\Robotic Platform Codes`
- [ ] Community plugins are enabled: Settings → Community Plugins → Turn ON

---

## 📦 Phase 1: Essential Plugins (Install These NOW)

### 1️⃣ Dataview
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Dataview"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"
- [ ] Settings → Dataview → Enable "Pretty Print Tables"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 2️⃣ Templater
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Templater"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"
- [ ] Settings → Templater → Set "Template folder location" to: `templates`
- [ ] Enable "Trigger Templater on new file creation"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 3️⃣ Obsidian Git
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Obsidian Git"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"
- [ ] Settings → Obsidian Git → Set "Git repository path"
- [ ] Enable "Commit on save"
- [ ] Set "Auto backup interval" to: 5 minutes

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

## 🔧 Phase 2: Recommended Plugins (Install This Week)

### 4️⃣ Excalidraw
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Excalidraw"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"
- [ ] Settings → Excalidraw → Set "Drawing folder" to: `assets/diagrams`

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 5️⃣ Kanban
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Kanban"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

## 🎯 Phase 3: Optional Plugins (Install As Needed)

### 6️⃣ Calendar
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Calendar"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 7️⃣ Periodic Notes
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Periodic Notes"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 8️⃣ Mind Map
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Mind Map"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

### 9️⃣ Tag Wrangler
- [ ] Settings → Community Plugins → Browse
- [ ] Search: "Tag Wrangler"
- [ ] Click "Install"
- [ ] Click "Enable"

**Status**: ⬜ Not Started | ⬜ In Progress | ⬜ Complete

---

## 🎉 After Installation

### Test Your Setup
- [ ] Create a new note using a template (Ctrl+P → "Templater: Insert template")
- [ ] Create a simple Dataview query in a note
- [ ] Create an Excalidraw drawing
- [ ] Create a Kanban board
- [ ] Verify Git auto-backup is working

### Configure Hotkeys (Optional)
- [ ] Settings → Hotkeys
- [ ] Set hotkey for "Git: Commit all changes" (suggested: `Ctrl+Shift+S`)
- [ ] Set hotkey for "Templater: Insert template" (suggested: `Ctrl+Shift+T`)
- [ ] Set hotkey for "Excalidraw: New drawing" (suggested: `Ctrl+Shift+D`)

---

## 📝 Notes

Use this space to track any issues or customizations:

```
Plugin installed: _______________
Issues encountered: _______________
Custom settings: _______________
```

---

## 🆘 Troubleshooting Quick Reference

| Problem | Solution |
|---------|----------|
| Can't find Community Plugins | Check "Restricted mode" is OFF |
| Plugin not in search | Click "Refresh" button |
| Plugin not working | Restart Obsidian |
| Templater not inserting | Verify template folder path |
| Git sync failing | Check Git repo path and credentials |

---

**Full Guide**: See [INSTALL_PLUGINS.md](.obsidian/INSTALL_PLUGINS.md) for detailed instructions
